Supplemental GP Data

Supplemental GP Data
Starlink
Matching Results, All Launches: 1,178
Derived from latest Starlink ephemeris data from SpaceX's public data repository.
Starlink G17-48 Pre-Launch
Derived from a pre-launch Starlink-G17-48 state vector, provided by SpaceX. SupGP data is provided for the entire stack, as well as one for a single satellite.
Launch: 2026-07-11 02:00:00 UTC.
Deploy: 2026-07-11 03:01:35.980 UTC.
Launch window: 2026-07-11 02:00:00 UTC to 2026-07-11 06:00:00 UTC.

Derived from a pre-launch Starlink-G10-42 state vector, provided by SpaceX. SupGP data is provided for the entire stack, as well as one for a single satellite.

Transporter-17 Post-Deployment
Derived from individual Post-Deployment Transporter-17 state vectors for each object in the initial deployment, provided by SpaceX.
 Launch: 2026-07-07 07:12:00.143 UTC.
Deployments: 2026-07-07 08:06:32.463 UTC to 2026-07-07 09:41:57.983 UTC.

Derived from latest SES ephemeris data on Space Track, with permission from SES.
Intelsat
Matching Results, Full Constellation
Derived from latest Intelsat Ephemeris Data IAW IESS 412 Rev 3.

Derived from latest Telesat ephemeris data on Space Track, with permission from Telesat.

Matching Results, Full Constellation: 0
Derived from latest Orbcomm ephemeris data on Space Track, with permission from Orbcomm.
ISS
Derived from NASA OEM Ephemeris Data in 6-hour segments.
Additional information can be found at Spot the Station.
CSS
Derived from CMS OEM Ephemeris Data in 6-hour segments.
Additional information can be found at China Manned Space News.
CPF
Matching Results, All Prediction Centers: 9
Derived from latest Consolidated Laser Ranging Prediction Ephemeris Data (requires login account) IAW Consolidated Laser Ranging Prediction Format Version 2.00. Data is provided by these ILRS Prediction Centers.
AST Space Mobile
Matching Results, Full Constellation: 1
Derived from latest AST Space Mobile ephemeris data on Space Track, with permission from AST Space Mobile.

Derived from latest EUMETSAT ephemeris data on Space Track, with permission from EUMETSAT.

An asterisk indicates a mismatch or cross-tag
